summary: Circle Detail View Feature Testing Complete - 100% pass rate. All 17 backend API tests passed. CircleDetailView UI verified: clickable circle cards, detail page with header/back button/inner tabs, Join/Leave toggle, all content sections load correctly. All 6 main tabs work (regression).
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for CircleDetailView components
RTL layout correctly applied with dir='rtl' on container
Join/Leave toggle properly uses POST endpoints with correct state management
Inner tabs (Feed, Leaders, Missions) render with proper data-testid attributes
Back button state management correctly restores to circles list
test_credentials: Anonymous user (no auth required for circle endpoints)
seed_data_creation: None required - demo data generated by backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Circle Detail View feature complete. New backend endpoints tested: GET /api/orientation/value-circles/{circle_id}?user_id=xxx (returns circle info, is_member status, feed with 8 items, leaderboard with 5 leaders, missions array), POST /api/orientation/value-circles/leave (removes membership). New frontend testids: circle-detail-view, circle-detail-back, circle-detail-header, circle-detail-toggle-membership, circle-detail-tabs, circle-tab-feed, circle-tab-leaders, circle-tab-missions, circle-feed, circle-feed-item-{n}, circle-leaders, circle-leader-{n}, circle-missions, circle-mission-{n}. Circle IDs: builders_of_order, explorers, contributors, regenerators, social_connectors, deep_thinkers.

CircleDetailView.circle-detail-view: PASS - Loads after clicking circle card
CircleDetailView.circle-detail-back: PASS - Shows 'חזרה למעגלים', returns to list
CircleDetailView.circle-detail-header: PASS - Shows circle name, direction tag, description, member count
CircleDetailView.circle-tab-feed: PASS - Default tab, shows 8 feed items
CircleDetailView.circle-tab-missions: PASS - Shows missions with progress bars

GET /api/orientation/value-circles/build.feed: 8 items with alias, action_he, direction, impact
GET /api/orientation/value-circles/build.leaderboard: 5 leaders with rank, alias, country, impact, actions
